commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer/security handling because the PR is protected, security-sensitive, still has actionable findings, and the contributor proof gate is not satisfied.; Needs attention: The patch tightens exec trust identity, but doctor diagnostics can still disagree with the new runtime realpath trust behavior.; Review finding: [P1] Use an exact trusted safe-bin realpath in the test — src/infra/exec-approvals-safe-bins... commands.review_summary:
The branch changes exec allowlists, safe-bin trust, skill auto-allow, Allow Always persistence, approval audit metadata, tests, and changelog to use executable realpaths as the trust identity.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible because allowlist matching uses the PATH-resolved path while approved execution pins to the executable realpath, so a symlinked binary with a distinct realpath exercises the mismatch.
